about.title: From Workpiece to Source Code
about.p1: I used to program machines with micrometer precision. Today, I do the same with interfaces. What changed? The medium. What stayed the same? My commitment to structural integrity.
about.p2: In CNC manufacturing, there is no room for maybe. That is the mindset I bring into my Angular projects: clean data flow, maintainable components, and code design that stays reliable even under high complexity.

0.text: Organization, process awareness, and reliable communication.

1.text: Technical accuracy, systematic troubleshooting, and a strong quality mindset.

2.text: Angular, TypeScript & SCSS: focused on component logic and UI structure.

3.text: Junior Frontend Developer - ready to take responsibility in a team and implement features in a structured way.

about.lead: I am not looking for standard jobs, but for challenges where technical systems thinking makes the difference.

bullets.location: Aachen - open to hybrid or remote work models.
bullets.hook: Highly motivated to learn - quick onboarding and early visible results.

academyImpact.title: When Logic Becomes the Solution
academyImpact.p1: 2023 was the year of transition. What started as a health-related necessity quickly turned into my biggest opportunity: coding.
academyImpact.p2: At Developer Akademie, I did not just learn syntax - I learned how to build complex systems from the first idea to the final code. My most successful project so far is a gatekeeper tool for mathematical pre-validation.
academyImpact.p3: The real stress test for my tool came on 26.01.2026: my live presentation at Forschungszentrum Jülich in front of Prof. Dr. Dr. Thomas Lippert, where my tool delivered cleanly.
academyImpact.p4: I am grateful to Developer Akademie for making this new start possible for me.
